001package net.okocraft.box.api.command.base;
002
003import net.okocraft.box.api.command.Command;
004import net.okocraft.box.api.command.SubCommandHoldable;
005import org.jetbrains.annotations.Nullable;
006
007/**
008 * An interface of /box command.
009 */
010public interface BoxCommand extends Command, SubCommandHoldable {
011
012    /**
013     * Changes the command when there is no argument.
014     *
015     * @param command the command to change
016     */
017    void changeNoArgumentCommand(@Nullable Command command);
018}
